content: DASN-SIMEI normal deadline: May 31 of following year. Special situations: MEI that cancelled in Q1 (Jan-Apr) must file by June 30 of same year; cancelled in Q2-Q3 (May-Dec) must file by last day of month FOLLOWING cancellation. DASN mandatory even with R/usr/bin/bash revenue. Late filing penalty: 2% per month in arrears, minimum R0. After 3 consecutive years without filing, Receita Federal cancels CNPJ ex-officio.
